## Now
<!-- narrative:start -->
**Focus:** Game content + pipeline consolidation. The TradeForge workflow (Forgejo →
GitHub mirror → claude.ai web) is live and in daily use.

**Last shipped:** **Hollow House key-gate micro-quest** (merged 2026-06-19, PR #2) —
the first playable authored-interior loop: village_green entrance → dig the key →
unlock the inner door → read the ledger (recontextualization beat) → exit. 275 tests
green. Plus a librarian pass integrating the 2026-06-20 pixel-art pipeline research.

**Next:** Resolve the **open backdrop decision**
(`decisions/2026-06-20-village-backdrop-rerender`: keep painted backdrops vs re-render
into the 32px register — rec: defer + pilot one zone). Art-register Stage 1 (master
palette + WebGL2 palette-clamp shader) when art work starts; then more interiors +
companion sprite/anim work.

**Watch out for:** only `/home/seitanist/cycle_of_innocence` is canonical — two stale
copies under `/home/seitanist/game/` cause "my changes aren't showing." Painted
backdrops + 32px sprites are a deliberate mixed style (now an open decision). Hollow
House interiors are still graybox.
<!-- narrative:end -->
